prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This report pertains to tenant satisfaction measures relevant specifically to England, as indicated by references to registered landlords in the context of England's housing framework and regulatory standards. It does not encompass tenant satisfaction measures pertinent to Scotland.
